sources.notes: Liberal Democracy Index 2024. Used for electoral pillar (proxy for V-Dem EDI which we don't extract per-component yet).
EIU Democracy Index 2024. CZ rank 23, classified as 'full democracy' for first time since 2013.
Freedom in the World 2025 aggregate (PR 37/40 + CL 58/60). Per-category subscores used in mapping: A=4, B=3.75, C=3.67, D=4, E=4, F=3.75, G=3.75 (each /4).
Press Freedom Index 2025. CZ jumped to 10th place, citing increase in public broadcasting funding.
Corruption Perceptions Index 2024. CZ rank 39/180. +3 oproti 2023.
Rule of Law Index 2024. CZ rank 20/140 (15/31 v EU+EFTA+NA). Per-factor scores nedostupné z webu, použit overall jako proxy pro judicial. Iter 6+ doplnit z WJP Excel datasetu.

notes: v0.2 mapping per methodology/structural_mapping.md. Vážený overall: 85.0. Limitace: WJP per-factor a V-Dem per-component data nejsou v tomto iter extrahované — corruption pilíř má jen 1 zdroj (TI CPI), governance/judicial používají WJP overall jako proxy. Iter 6+ to upřesní. Pro srovnání: EIU 2024 přímo dává 80.8, V-Dem LDI 81.7 — náš agregát 85.0 je o ~3 body výš díky zahrnutí FH (95).
